description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named facebook/redex/build_and_test that can be called as a reusable workflow. It should have a matrix build with multiple jobs: one for Linux GCC on various Debian and Ubuntu versions and architectures, one for building with Clang on Debian, and one for building on Windows. Each job should check out the repository, install prerequisites, and use custom actions to prepare and set up the build and test environment.
